xml.etree.ElementInclude/ParseError/posi.name: position
xml.etree.ElementInclude/ParseError/posi.description: A tuple of line, column numbers, specifying where the error occurred.

info.excerpt: A tuple of line, column numbers, specifying where the error occurred.

xml.etree.ElementInclude/ParseError.name: ParseError
xml.etree.ElementInclude/ParseError.description: XML parse error, raised by the various parsing methods in this module when parsing fails. The string representation of an instance of this exception will contain a user-friendly error message. In addition, it will have the following attributes available: code¶ A numeric error code from the expat parser. See the documentation of xml.parsers.expat for the list of error codes and their meanings. position¶ A tuple of line, column numbers, specifying where the error occurred.

xml.etree.ElementInclude/ProcessingInstr.name: ProcessingInstruction
xml.etree.ElementInclude/ProcessingInstr.description: PI element factory. This factory function creates a special element that will be serialized as an XML processing instruction. target is a string containing the PI target. text is a string containing the PI contents, if given. Returns an element instance, representing a processing instruction. Note that XMLParser skips over processing instructions in the input instead of creating PI objects for them. An ElementTree will only contain processing instruction nodes if they have been inserted into ...

xml.etree.ElementInclude/parse.name: parse
xml.etree.ElementInclude/parse.description: Parses an XML section into an element tree. source is a filename or file object containing XML data. parser is an optional parser instance. If not given, the standard XMLParser parser is used. Returns an ElementTree instance.

xml.etree.ElementInclude/ElementTree/par.name: parse
xml.etree.ElementInclude/ElementTree/par.description: Loads an external XML section into this element tree. source is a file name or file object. parser is an optional parser instance. If not given, the standard XMLParser parser is used. Returns the section root element.

xml.etree.ElementInclude/TreeBuilder/pi.name: pi
xml.etree.ElementInclude/TreeBuilder/pi.description: Creates a process instruction with the given target name and text. If insert_pis is true, this will also add it to the tree. Added in version 3.8.

info.excerpt: Creates a process instruction with the given target name and text. If insert_pis is true, this will also add it to the tree. Added in version 3.8.
